source: Based on CATEGORY_GRAPH.md and transition research
description: Fundamental emotional transition patterns with difficulty assessments

patterns.name: High Arousal to Low Arousal
patterns.from_cat: Places We Go When Things Are Uncertain or Too Much
patterns.to_cat: Places We Go When Life Is Good
patterns.reasoning: Requires physiological downregulation before cognitive reappraisal

patterns.name: Negative Connection to Positive Connection
patterns.from_cat: Places We Go When We Fall Short
patterns.reasoning: Requires vulnerability as bridge - connection heals shame

patterns.name: Social Disconnection to Connection
patterns.from_cat: Places We Go When We Search for Connection

patterns.name: High Negative Valence to Acceptance
patterns.from_cat: Places We Go When We Feel Wronged
patterns.to_cat: Places We Go When Things Don't Go As Planned
patterns.reasoning: Requires releasing blame and processing grief

patterns.name: Overwhelm to Regulated State
patterns.from_cat: Places We Go When Things Are Uncertain or Too Much
patterns.to_cat: Places We Go When Life Is Good
patterns.reasoning: Requires breaking down complexity and permission to rest
